claims.evidence_text: The total evapotranspiration of the crop in both years of cultivation was 360 mm, with mean values of 3.87 mm d-1 for cultivar BRS 254 and 4.10 mm d-1 for cultivar BRS 394.
claims.claim_summary: Total seasonal crop evapotranspiration of irrigated wheat was 360 mm (mean 3.87-4.10 mm/day) in lysimeters.

claims.evidence_text: The basal crops coefficients in the emergence, tillering, flowering, maturation and harvest stages were 0.42, 0.78, 0.94, 0.74 and 0.47 for cultivar BRS 254
claims.claim_summary: Basal crop coefficient (kcb) for irrigated wheat BRS 254 ranged 0.42 (emergence) to 0.94 (flowering) across growth stages.

claims.evidence_text: The baseline kcb coefficients used are: 0.15, 1.10 and 0.23 for the initial, development and final phases, respectively.
claims.claim_summary: FAO-56 tabulated basal crop coefficient (kcb) for wheat: 0.15 initial, 1.10 development, 0.23 final.

claims.evidence_text: The kc in turn presented a maximum value of 1.33, which represents values above those recommended for the cultivation of wheat.
claims.claim_summary: Maximum measured crop coefficient (kc) for irrigated wheat was 1.33.

claims.evidence_text: This value was defined considering an average evapotranspiration of 5 mm d-1 with a coefficient of depletion of 0.50, corresponding to the group of annual crops.
claims.claim_summary: Allowable soil-water depletion coefficient of 0.50 used for irrigated wheat scheduling.

claims.evidence_text: A water stress of about 50% of ETc significantly reduces biomass production and yield of wheat (Thapa et al., 2019).
claims.claim_summary: Water stress at ~50% of ETc significantly reduces wheat biomass and yield.

claims.evidence_text: 350 viable seeds per m2 were sown, with the aid of a specific sowing machine for experimental plots
claims.claim_summary: 350 viable seeds/m2 sown for irrigated wheat in the experiment.

claims.evidence_text: The base fertilization was applied with the sowing machine at approximately 5 cm depth, the same depth of seed distribution
claims.claim_summary: Wheat seed sown at approximately 5 cm depth.

claims.evidence_text: Each experimental unit consisted of 9 rows spaced apart by 0.20 m with 6 m length.
claims.claim_summary: Wheat rows spaced 0.20 m apart in the experiment.
